_comment: Replacement for the name entry character grid (the original offers
katakana only). 19 runs of 5 characters in the SYSTEM.BIN run order.
The name entry screen draws the runs as three 5-column groups:
rows 1-7, 8-14 and 15-19 (verified in-game), so the layout below
fills group 1 with capitals+punctuation, group 2 with lowercase and
group 3 with digits. The executable also holds a 10x10 copy of the
same runs (row K = run K | run K+9); both copies are patched.
A space means an empty (blank, types a space) cell. Every character
must map to a single token in the insert table: native capitals and
digits, single lowercase glyphs, fullwidth punctuation.
